'''''Star Wars Insider'' 26''' is the twenty-sixth issue of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine. It was published in [[July]] [[1995]].

==Contents==
===Departments===
*"[[Rebel Rumblings]]"
*"[[The Wonder Column|The New Wonder Column]]"
*"[[Prequel Update]]" with [[Rick McCallum]] {{C|by [[Dan Madsen]]}}
*"[[Scoring the Trilogy]]" {{C|by [[Lukas Kendall]]}}
*"[[Star Wars Around the World|''Star Wars'' Around the World]]"
*"[[The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth]]" – A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe Part 1 {{C|by [[Bob Cooper]]}}
*"[[Star News]]" {{C|by Jon Bradley Snyder}}
*"[[Lucasfilm's Latest]]"
*"[[LucasArts Update]]" – LucasArts Teams Up with Entertainment Giants to Offer the Epic Science Fiction Adventure, The Dig {{C|by [[Sue Seserman]]}}
*"[[Scouting the Galaxy]]: Almost Everything You Wanted to Know… (Response to Your Star Wars Snail Mail)"
*"Club Classifieds"
*"[[The Jawa Trader|Jawa Trader]]"

===Features===
*"[[An Exclusive Interview with George Lucas]]"
*:<small>What's happening with the new ''Star Wars'' prequels? The creator of ''Star Wars'' reveals his early plans for the new films in this exclusive feature!</small>
*"[[Star Weeze]]" {{C|by [[Jon Bradley Snyder]]}}
*:<small>A year ago Weezer was barely a blip on the pop music radar. Today, they have a multi-platinum album, several hit videos, and are playing larger and larger concert venues in a town near you. More importantly, they're all ''Star Wars'' fans. We introduce you to pop music's rising ''Star Wars'' fans!</small>
*"[[Wizard Oz]]" {{C|by [[Kevin Stevens]]}}
*:<small>Most people know him as the man behind Yoda and Miss Piggy, however, Frank Oz has moved way beyond being a master of Muppets. Today, he is one of Hollywood's leading directors with his latest picture just released, ''The Indian in the Cupboard''.</small>
*"[[Sound Advice: An Interview with Sound Man Ben Burtt]]" {{C|by [[Jamie Painter]]}}
*:<small>Ever wonder where all those alien sounds in the trilogy come from? How did Chewbacca get his bearish cry, R2-D2 get his electronic sigh or Darth Vader get his ominous breathing? They're all the creation of ''Star Wars'' sound designer Ben Burtt. The ''Insider'' spoke with Burtt recently about his important contribution to the sounds of ''Star Wars''.</small>
*"[[Skin Deep: Star Wars Tattoos|Skin Deep: ''Star Wars'' Tattoos]]" {{C|by Jon Bradley Snyder}}
*:<small>The ''Star Wars'' phenomenon crosses all boundaries and there are a multitude of creative ways that fans display their love for the trilogy. In this special photo feature, we show you an interesting, albeit offbeat, way some fans display their love of ''Star Wars''!</small>
*"[[The Write Stuff (Star Wars Insider 26)|The Write Stuff]]" {{C|by [[David Pescovitz]]}}
*:<small>He's the author of numerous ''Star Wars'' novels including the popular Jedi Academy Trilogy. Recently, we spoke with Kevin J. Anderson to discuss the pleasure and pain of writing original fiction in the ''Star Wars'' universe.</small>
